prompt_used: Story: Red Creek Winter (red-creek-winter) | Hook: Each snowfall uncovers one body and one impossible alibi. | Subgenre: small-town slasher mystery | Tone: INTENSE | Location: Mountain logging town under blizzard lockdown | Villain: The White Knife | Villain worldview: Fear is the only honest truth in a town built on denial. | Motifs: snow lines, hunting whistles, frosted glass. Compose ending score cue for "Compromised Truth" that supports summary "You stop killings but ignite permanent distrust in local institutions." and epilogue "The culprit is exposed, but allies and witnesses are fractured.".
